zh.lifeSummary: 當William Hancock II於1621年9月21日在英國英格蘭爾比德斯頓受洗時，他的父親William Hancock I41歲，母親Susanna Susan Poynter38歲。他於1642年8月28日與Sarah Cockroft在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州並於1607年住在南非奧拉聶-福利斯塔阿特弗吉尼亞。他去世在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州素利，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Hancock II于1621年9月21日在英国英格兰爾比德斯頓受洗时，他的父亲William Hancock I41岁，母亲Susanna Susan Poynter38岁。他于1642年8月28日与Sarah Cockroft在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州并于1607年住在南非奧拉聶-福利斯塔阿特弗吉尼亞。他去世在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州素利，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Hancock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hann + the hypocoristic suffix -cok, which was commonly added to personal names (see Cocke ).
Dutch: from Middle Dutch hanecoc ‘winkle, periwinkle’ (a type of shellfish), probably a metonymic occupational name for someone who gathered and sold shellfish.

History: Thomas Hancock, the uncle of Declaration of Independence signatory John Hancock (1736/7–93), was among the foremost of 18th-century American businessmen. He was a descendant of Nathaniel Hancock, who was known to have been in Cambridge, MA, as early as 1634. Born in Braintree, MA, John Hancock was president of the Second Continental Congress and the first governor of the state of MA.

variants.name: Hancox
meanings: English: variant of Hancock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Handcock
meanings: English: variant of Hancock with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hann
meanings: German and Dutch: from a shortened pet form of the personal name Johann (see John ).

English: from the Middle English personal name Hann, commonly a pet form of Henry (Middle English Hanry). Hann could also be a rhyming pet form of Randolph (Middle English Randal, shortened to Ran or Rand). Han was also a pet form of Joh(a)n in Middle Dutch, and it is possible that this usage was brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no evidence has yet been found that it was similarly used in Middle English. See Henry and Randall , and compare Hankin , Hancock , and Hanks .
English: variant of Ann with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Hancock II was christened on 21 September 1621, in Bidston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Hancock I, was 41 and his mother, Susanna Susan Poynter, was 38. He married Sarah Cockroft on 28 August 1642, in Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He immigrated to Virginia, British Colonial America in 1635 and lived in Virginia, Orange Free State, South Africa in 1607. He died in Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, and was buried in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Hancock II a été baptisé le 21 septembre 1621, à Bidston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Hancock I, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Susanna Susan Poynter, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Cockroft le 28 août 1642, à Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il a immigré au Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1635 et a vécu à Virginia, Oranje-Vrystaat, Afrique du Sud en 1607. Il est décédé à Surry, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Norfolk, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Hancock II am 21. September 1621 in Bidston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom getauft wurde, war sein Vater William Hancock I 41 und seine Mutter Susanna Susan Poynter 38. Er hat am 28. August 1642 in Virginia, British Colonial America Sarah Cockroft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er ist 1635 nach Virginia, British Colonial America eingewandert. 1607 hat er in Virginia, Oranje-Vrystaat, Südafrika gelebt. Er starb in Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Hancock II è stato battezzato il 21 settembre 1621 nel Bidston, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Hancock I, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Susanna Susan Poynter, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Cockroft il 28 agosto 1642, nel Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Immigrato nel Virginia, British Colonial America nel 1635 e vissuto a Virginia, Oranje-Vrystaat, Sudafrica nel 1607. Morì nel Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: William Hancock IIが1621年9月21日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアビドストンで洗礼を受けた時，父William Hancock Iは41歳，母Susanna Susan Poynterは38歳であった。1642年8月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州でSarah Cockroftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州に移住し，1607年には南アフリカオランジェ-vリスタアトバージニアに住んでいた。彼はイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州スリーで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Hancock II(이)가 1621년 9월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 비드스턴에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 William Hancock I(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Susanna Susan Poynter(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1642년 8월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 Sarah Cockroft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1635년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주로 이민을 떠났고, 1607년도에 남아프리카 오랜제이-브리스타앳 버지니아에서 살았다. 그는 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 수리에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Hancock II foi batizado em 21 de setembro de 1621, em Bidston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Hancock I, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Susan Poynter, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Cockroft em 28 de agosto de 1642, em Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Virginia, British Colonial America em 1635 e viveu em Virginia, Oranje-Vrystaat, África do Sul em 1607. Ele faleceu em Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Hancock II был крещен 21 сентября 1621 г. в местности бидстон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Hancock I было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Susanna Susan Poynter, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Cockroft 28 августа 1642 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он иммигрировал в Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году, а также жил в местности виргиня, орандже-вристаат, Южная Африка в 1607 году. Он умер в местности сурри, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности норфолк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Hancock II se bautizó el 21 de septiembre de 1621, en Bidston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Hancock I, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Susanna Susan Poynter, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sarah Cockroft el 28 de agosto de 1642, en Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Inmigró a Virginia, British Colonial America en 1635 y vivió en Virginia, Oranje-Vrystaat, Sudáfrica en 1607. Murió en Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America.
